name: discord-bot-builder
description: A visual node-based Discord bot builder with React Flow and Express

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.prod: npm run build -w frontend && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run preview -w frontend"
